title: Command
description: The Command Component provides a lightweight, fast, and accessible command palette interface for searching and executing actions. It helps users quickly find items, filter lists, or trigger commands using keyboard interactions.

sections.title: Custom Template
sections.description: Pass a custom template to the command component and render it instead of the default layout.

props.name: value
props.description: Array of menu items to display in the command palette. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the search input. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set to true, it disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: If set to true, user cannot change the value of component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: The validation state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Predefined look schemes for the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: onSubmit
events.description: Fires when a menu item is selected or submitted.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)
